/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/oop_1_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/line.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/figure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/circle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/figure_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/ellips.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_1.dir/parallel.cpp.o -o oop_1.app/Contents/MacOS/oop_1 -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
